series_metadata.series_description: Index, by subject, victim, and/or county, to cases worked on by the Bureau of Criminal Investigation (BCI) laboratory. Information in index includes, but is not limited to, case number, county, subject and/or victim name, submitting law enforcement agency, and type of case. Index ceased to be created in 2002 and is no longer referred to during normal course of business. [This record series is obsolete.]

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: This is a one-time disposal of obsolete records. records will be disposed upon approval of this retention schedule
